mapper.sql: pk_schedule, pk_schedule_group, name, job_class, trigger_type, trigger_expr, principal, is_active, last_run_status, des, pk_createdby, dt_created, pk_modifiedby, dt_modified, ds, version
mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from schedule
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
from schedule
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into schedule (pk_schedule, pk_schedule_group, name, job_class, trigger_type, trigger_expr, principal, is_active, last_run_status, des, pk_createdby, dt_created, pk_modifiedby, dt_modified, ds, version, clob_cfg, clob_run_time ) values (#{pkSchedule,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{pkScheduleGroup,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{triggerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{triggerExpr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{principal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isActive,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lastRunStatus,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{des,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pkCreatedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{dtCreated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{pkModifiedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{dtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{ds,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{version,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{clobCfg,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{clobRunTime,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} )

insert into schedule
pk_schedule,
pk_schedule_group,
name,
job_class,
trigger_type,
trigger_expr,
principal,
is_active,
last_run_status,
des,
pk_createdby,
dt_created,
pk_modifiedby,
dt_modified,
ds,
version,
clob_cfg,
clob_run_time,
#{pkSchedule,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{pkScheduleGroup,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{jobClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{triggerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{triggerExpr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{principal,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isActive,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{lastRunStatus,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{des,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{pkCreatedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{dtCreated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{pkModifiedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{dtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{ds,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{version,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{clobCfg,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{clobRunTime,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update schedule
pk_schedule = #{record.pkSchedule,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
pk_schedule_group = #{record.pkScheduleGroup,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
name = #{record.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
job_class = #{record.jobClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trigger_type = #{record.triggerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trigger_expr = #{record.triggerExpr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
principal = #{record.principal,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_active = #{record.isActive,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
last_run_status = #{record.lastRunStatus,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
des = #{record.des,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pk_createdby = #{record.pkCreatedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
dt_created = #{record.dtCreated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
pk_modifiedby = #{record.pkModifiedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
dt_modified = #{record.dtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ds = #{record.ds,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
version = #{record.version,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
clob_cfg = #{record.clobCfg,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
clob_run_time = #{record.clobRunTime,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},

update schedule set pk_schedule = #{record.pkSchedule,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, pk_schedule_group = #{record.pkScheduleGroup,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, name = #{record.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_class = #{record.jobClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trigger_type = #{record.triggerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trigger_expr = #{record.triggerExpr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, principal = #{record.principal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_active = #{record.isActive,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, last_run_status = #{record.lastRunStatus,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, des = #{record.des,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pk_createdby = #{record.pkCreatedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, dt_created = #{record.dtCreated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, pk_modifiedby = #{record.pkModifiedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, dt_modified = #{record.dtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ds = #{record.ds,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, version = #{record.version,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, clob_cfg = #{record.clobCfg,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, clob_run_time = #{record.clobRunTime,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}

update schedule set pk_schedule = #{record.pkSchedule,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, pk_schedule_group = #{record.pkScheduleGroup,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, name = #{record.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_class = #{record.jobClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trigger_type = #{record.triggerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trigger_expr = #{record.triggerExpr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, principal = #{record.principal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_active = #{record.isActive,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, last_run_status = #{record.lastRunStatus,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, des = #{record.des,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pk_createdby = #{record.pkCreatedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, dt_created = #{record.dtCreated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, pk_modifiedby = #{record.pkModifiedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, dt_modified = #{record.dtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ds = #{record.ds,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, version = #{record.version,jdbcType=DECIMAL}

update schedule
pk_schedule_group = #{pkScheduleGroup,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
job_class = #{jobClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trigger_type = #{triggerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trigger_expr = #{triggerExpr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
principal = #{principal,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_active = #{isActive,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
last_run_status = #{lastRunStatus,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
des = #{des,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pk_createdby = #{pkCreatedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
dt_created = #{dtCreated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
pk_modifiedby = #{pkModifiedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
dt_modified = #{dtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ds = #{ds,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
version = #{version,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
clob_cfg = #{clobCfg,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
clob_run_time = #{clobRunTime,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where pk_schedule = #{pkSchedule,jdbcType=DECIMAL}

update schedule set pk_schedule_group = #{pkScheduleGroup,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_class = #{jobClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trigger_type = #{triggerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trigger_expr = #{triggerExpr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, principal = #{principal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_active = #{isActive,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, last_run_status = #{lastRunStatus,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, des = #{des,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pk_createdby = #{pkCreatedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, dt_created = #{dtCreated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, pk_modifiedby = #{pkModifiedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, dt_modified = #{dtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ds = #{ds,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, version = #{version,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, clob_cfg = #{clobCfg,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, clob_run_time = #{clobRunTime,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where pk_schedule = #{pkSchedule,jdbcType=DECIMAL}

update schedule set pk_schedule_group = #{pkScheduleGroup,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_class = #{jobClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trigger_type = #{triggerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trigger_expr = #{triggerExpr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, principal = #{principal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_active = #{isActive,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, last_run_status = #{lastRunStatus,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, des = #{des,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pk_createdby = #{pkCreatedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, dt_created = #{dtCreated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, pk_modifiedby = #{pkModifiedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, dt_modified = #{dtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ds = #{ds,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, version = #{version,jdbcType=DECIMAL} where pk_schedule = #{pkSchedule,jdbcType=DECIMAL}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO schedule (pk_schedule, pk_schedule_group, name, job_class, trigger_type, trigger_expr, principal, is_active, last_run_status, des, pk_createdby, dt_created, pk_modifiedby, dt_modified, ds, version, clob_cfg, clob_run_time) VALUES
(#{item.pkSchedule}, #{item.pkScheduleGroup}, #{item.name}, #{item.jobClass}, #{item.triggerType}, #{item.triggerExpr}, #{item.principal}, #{item.isActive}, #{item.lastRunStatus}, #{item.des}, #{item.pkCreatedby}, #{item.dtCreated}, #{item.pkModifiedby}, #{item.dtModified}, #{item.ds}, #{item.version}, #{item.clobCfg}, #{item.clobRunTime})
